title: NIDMP Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 06 Faculty Posts
description: The National Institute of Design Madhya Pradesh (NIDMP) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 06 Principal Designers and Senior Faculty Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Post-graduation and PGDM can apply for the NIDMP Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, ...
